title: FTMO €101 OFF
description: FTMO, based in the Czech Republic and established January 2015, is a CFD prop trading firm offering 2 Steps and 1 Step programs. It provides account sizes from $10,000 to $200,000 and supports MT5, cTrader, DXTrade and MT4. Recently acquired OANDA to expand into regulated brokerage. Verified by our [Intelligence Hub](/) for prop trading excellence.

payout_policy.details: 90% for 1-Step Standard; 80% for 2-Step. Scaling upgrades rewards up to 90% and balance by 25% every 4 months (+10% profit).

firm_rules.copy_trading: Allowed for own accounts; Max capital allocation limits: 400k (Normal), 600k (Prime), 1M (Supreme Prime). Copying other traders is strictly prohibited.
firm_rules.expert_advisor: Allowed, but third-party EAs are strictly prohibited.
firm_rules.inactivity_rule: 30 days (can freeze for 7 days to 6 months).
firm_rules.news_trading: Allowed for Swing (Eval/Funded) and Standard (Eval). Prohibited for Standard Funded stage 2 mins before/after news.
firm_rules.weekend_holding: Allowed for Swing accounts. Prohibited for Standard funded accounts.

seo_content:
FTMO: Czech Republic Prop Firm Since 2015

FTMO is one of the longest-running prop trading firms in the industry, based in the Czech Republic and established in January 2015. Operating as a CFD prop firm for over a decade, FTMO is known for stringent evaluation standards and transparent rule-setting. In December 2025, FTMO finalized its acquisition of OANDA, extending its reach into regulated brokerage services and adding institutional credibility to its offering.

FTMO offers two core evaluation paths: the Standard Challenge (2-step) in five account sizes from EUR 10,000 to EUR 200,000, with fees from EUR 89 (10K) to EUR 1,080 (200K), and the 1-Step Challenge launched in February 2026 covering 10K, 50K, and 100K accounts. The Swing Challenge runs on the same 2-step structure for traders who hold positions overnight and over weekends. All pricing is denominated in EUR.

Four trading platforms are supported: MT5, cTrader, DXTrade, and MT4. Tradable instruments cover Forex, Metals, Indices, Energy, Crypto, and Stocks. News trading is permitted during Standard evaluations and on all Swing accounts, but is restricted on Standard funded accounts within 2 minutes before and after major news releases. Weekend holding is available on Swing accounts only and prohibited on Standard funded accounts.

Funded traders on the 2-Step program receive an 80% profit split; the 1-Step Standard offers 90%. Payouts operate on a 14-day cycle with minimum withdrawals of $20 (Bank Wire) and $50 (Crypto). FTMO's scaling plan rewards consistency: every 4 months with at least 10% profit, traders receive a 25% account balance increase and can earn up to 90% profit split. Supported payout methods include Bank Transfer, Crypto, Mastercard, Skrill, and Visa Direct.

FTMO stands apart through its decade-long track record, four-platform support, and a structured scaling program that progressively rewards profitable traders. Copy trading is permitted across a trader's own accounts with allocation caps of 400K (Normal), 600K (Prime), and 1M (Supreme Prime). Payments are accepted via Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, Skrill, Nuvei, Credit/Debit Card, Bank Transfer, and Crypto.
